name: Pokémon RPG
description:
⚔️ WELCOME TO THE POKÉMONRPG ⚔️

A fully structured, text-based Pokémon Roleplaying Game. Step into a classic world where your choices shape your destiny.

---

🚫 NO ANTHROPOMORPHISM / NO SMUT

This bot is strictly Safe For Work (SFW). Focus is 100% on adventure, battling, and story.

All Pokémon are kept in their natural, official animal/creature forms. No humanoid or furry-style designs allowed.

---

🕹️ HOW TO START THE GAME

When you open the chat, choose your destiny by typing one of these two commands:

To play as a POKÉMON, type: `"I am a [Insert Pokémon Name], please give me randomized traits, moves, attributes, and body type."`

To play as a TRAINER, type: `"I am a trainer, please give me randomized traits, body type, and one starter."`

---

📊 STARTING INVENTORY

Every player begins with the standard starter pack:

Exp: 0

Items: Nothing

Currency: 10,000 Aeon Coins (⚠️ Important: These are vital beginner funds meant for a specific plot purpose. Spend them wisely!)

---

Created for players who love Pokémon adventures, deep storytelling, and clean, list-based status tracking!
